name: tier-b/ruby/02-single-gem
description: Single-gem layout: root Gemfile + root *.gemspec, no subdirectory gemspecs. Single-gem; no evidence emitted.

manifests.mygem.gemspec:
Gem::Specification.new do |spec|
  spec.name        = "mygem"
  spec.version     = "0.1.0"
  spec.authors     = ["Example"]
  spec.summary     = "My gem"
  spec.files       = Dir["lib/**/*"]
  spec.require_paths = ["lib"]
end
